LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS JAMES ALBERT, CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: GRANT. RESPONDENT CHEMED CORPORATION HAS FILED A DECLARATION OF NON-OPPOSITION, AND RESPONDENT ROBERT E. MANGINE, JR. HAS NOT OPPOSED THE PETITION. THE ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONERS JAMES ALBERT, CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Grant. Respondent Chemed Corporation has filed a declaration of non-opposition, and respondent Robert E. Mangine, Jr. has not opposed the petition.

The order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
